description: Roadmaps for learning popular programming languages

steps: Programming Foundations: How Python runs, interpreter vs compiler, installing Python, writing scripts, REPL usage
Core Syntax Mastery: Variables, data types, operators, input/output, basic debugging habits
Control Flow: if/elif/else, loops (for/while), break/continue, pattern-based problem solving
Functions Deep Dive: parameters, return values, scope, recursion, lambda basics, writing reusable logic
Core Data Structures: lists, tuples, sets, dictionaries with real-world manipulation patterns
Strings & File Handling: string operations, parsing, reading/writing files, working with CSV/JSON
Modules & Standard Library: importing, structuring code, datetime, os, sys, collections, pathlib
Object-Oriented Programming: classes, objects, inheritance, encapsulation, polymorphism, dunder methods
Error Handling & Debugging: exceptions, try/except, logging basics, debugging strategies
Intermediate Problem Solving (DSA Basics): arrays, stacks, queues, hashing, sorting, searching, recursion practice
Environment & Package Management: venv, pip, poetry, dependency isolation, project structure
Advanced Python Features: decorators, generators, iterators, context managers, comprehensions at scale
Typing & Code Quality: type hints, mypy/pyright, linting (ruff), formatting (black)
Concurrency & Parallelism: threading, multiprocessing, async/await, event loop understanding
Working with APIs: requests, REST APIs, JSON handling, authentication basics
Web Development Basics: Flask/FastAPI/Django fundamentals, routing, middleware, request lifecycle
Databases: SQL basics, SQLite/PostgreSQL, ORM usage (SQLAlchemy/Django ORM)
Testing: pytest, unit vs integration testing, mocking, test-driven development basics
Deployment Basics: environment variables, Docker basics, deploying simple apps
Advanced Engineering Skills: architecture patterns, performance optimization, profiling, production debugging
How JavaScript Works: engine basics, browser vs Node.js, runtime environment
Core Syntax: variables, data types, operators, console usage, script execution
Control Flow: conditions, loops, truthy/falsy logic, clean branching patterns
Functions & Scope: function types, closures, lexical scope, recursion, callbacks
Objects & Arrays: manipulation, methods, destructuring, spread/rest operators
Prototypes & Inheritance: prototype chain, constructor functions, class syntax foundation
DOM Fundamentals: selecting elements, events, manipulation, dynamic UI building
Asynchronous JavaScript: event loop, callbacks, promises, async/await, fetch API
Error Handling & Debugging: try/catch, debugging in browser tools, runtime errors
Modern JavaScript (ES6+): modules, let/const, arrow functions, template literals
Advanced Data Handling: map/filter/reduce, immutability patterns
Working with APIs: REST APIs, JSON parsing, authentication basics
Node.js Basics: runtime, modules, npm, file system, basic server creation
Frontend State & Architecture: component thinking, modular code structure
Web Performance Basics: rendering cycle, memory leaks, optimization basics
Testing: unit testing basics (Jest/Vitest), test structure, assertions
Security Basics: XSS, CSRF, safe data handling
Build Tools: bundlers (Vite/Webpack), transpiling, linting
Advanced Patterns: currying, composition, design patterns in JS
Full Stack Integration: connecting frontend + backend, deployment basics
Java Setup & Execution Model: JVM, JRE, JDK, compiling and running programs
Basic Syntax: variables, data types, operators, input/output
Control Flow: loops, conditionals, switch statements, problem solving patterns
Methods: parameters, return types, overloading, recursion basics
Object-Oriented Fundamentals: classes, objects, constructors, encapsulation
OOP Deep Dive: inheritance, polymorphism, abstraction, interfaces
Core Java APIs: Strings, Math, Arrays, Wrapper classes, utility methods
Exception Handling: try/catch/finally, custom exceptions, error hierarchy
Collections Framework: List, Set, Map, Queue, iterators, generics
File Handling & I/O: reading/writing files, streams, serialization basics
Advanced OOP Concepts: inner classes, enums, records, design principles
Functional Programming in Java: lambdas, streams, functional interfaces
Concurrency Basics: threads, synchronization, executors, virtual threads
JVM Internals: memory model, garbage collection basics, performance awareness
Database Connectivity: JDBC, SQL integration, ORM introduction
Build Tools: Maven/Gradle project lifecycle, dependency management
Web Development: Spring Boot fundamentals, REST APIs, controllers, services
Testing: JUnit, Mockito, integration testing strategies
Logging & Monitoring: SLF4J, Logback, production debugging
System Design Basics: layering, architecture, scalability fundamentals
C++ Environment Setup: compilers, IDEs, build process, first program
Basic Syntax: variables, input/output, operators, program structure
Control Flow: loops, conditionals, switch, clean logic building
Functions: declaration, overloading, recursion, inline functions
Memory Basics: stack vs heap, pointers introduction, references
Pointers Deep Dive: pointer arithmetic, dynamic memory, smart pointers
OOP Fundamentals: classes, objects, constructors, destructors
Advanced OOP: inheritance, polymorphism, virtual functions, abstraction
Code Organization: headers, source files, namespaces, compilation model
STL Fundamentals: vectors, lists, maps, sets, iterators, algorithms
Advanced STL Usage: sorting, custom comparators, functional utilities
Templates: function/class templates, specialization, generic programming
Error Handling: exceptions, RAII principle, resource safety
Modern C++ Features: auto, nullptr, lambdas, move semantics
Memory Management Patterns: RAII, smart pointers, ownership rules
Build Systems: CMake, compilation pipelines, linking
Performance Concepts: optimization, undefined behavior, profiling basics
Multithreading: threads, synchronization, concurrency primitives
Advanced Templates: SFINAE, type traits, compile-time programming
Real-world Development: library usage, system-level programming, project architecture
Go Environment Setup: installation, workspace, modules, running programs
Language Basics: syntax, variables, constants, basic types
Control Flow: if/else, loops, switch, clean control patterns
Functions: multiple returns, named returns, closures, recursion
Composite Types: arrays, slices, maps, structs in practical usage
Pointers: memory model, pointer usage, value vs reference behavior
Methods & Interfaces: method sets, interface design, polymorphism
Error Handling: error interface, custom errors, best practices
Packages & Modules: project structure, dependency management, reuse
Concurrency Fundamentals: goroutines, channels, select statement
Concurrency Patterns: worker pools, pipelines, synchronization
Standard Library Mastery: fmt, io, os, encoding/json, time
Testing: unit tests, table-driven tests, benchmarking
Web Development: net/http, routing, middleware, REST APIs
Database Integration: SQL drivers, ORM basics, connection pooling
CLI Development: building tools, flags, configuration handling
Performance Tools: profiling, pprof, benchmarking optimization
Advanced Concurrency: context package, cancellation, race conditions
Reflection & Generics: dynamic behavior, generic programming
Production Deployment: binaries, Docker, cloud deployment basics
